title: isoloma schizolomae
intro: Isoloma schizolomae, also known as Isoloma, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand, belonging to the family Hymenophyllaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. Isoloma schizolomae has been traditionally used to treat respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, due to its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including coughs, colds, and flu.
